alternative_parents.description: Organoboron compounds where the boron atom is substituted by only two alkyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkylboranes

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Heterocyclic compounds contain one metal ring atom.
class.name: Metalloheterocyclic compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as borinanes. These are organic heterocyclic compounds containing a saturated aliphatic six-membered ring consisting of five carbon atoms and one boron atom.

direct_parent.description: Organic heterocyclic compounds containing a saturated aliphatic six-membered ring consisting of five carbon atoms and one boron atom.
direct_parent.name: Borinanes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic heterocyclic compounds containing a saturated aliphatic six-membered ring consisting of five carbon atoms and one boron atom.
subclass.name: Borinanes

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
